summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs plus hydrated linked context. No merge is recommended because no open PR has a complete merge preflight with clean latest review-bot state, resolved comments, passing relevant checks, and known mergeability. Two small contributor PRs have plausible repair paths, but this result does not include a complete executable single-branch fix artifact, so those repair recommendations are downgraded to maintainer follow-up rather than placeholder fix actions.
